data.title: Sister Breeder
data.synopsis:
Omiya Rena, a student council president, and her younger brother, Shota, who has had a obsessive "sister complex" since childhood. With their parents away for a year, Shota's inappropriate advances and harassment escalate from childish pranks to serious sexual coercion. Despite knowing their relationship is wrong, Rena finds herself unable to resist or stop him, ultimately succumbing to his desires and agreeing to become his "sex slave." The synopsis concludes with their younger sister, Aina, returning home unexpectedly, potentially discovering their secret incestuous relationship.

(Source: Hentaimama)

data.title: Liar Game
data.synopsis:
College student Nao Kanzaki has always adhered to her name's meaning: "foolishly honest." However, after opening an unsolicited package containing one hundred million yen, she inadvertently accepts an invitation for the "Liar Game." In this tournament, contestants are encouraged to betray and deceive their opponents to gain a massive amount of cash; conversely, losing will incur a lifetime debt. With all hopes lost, her only option left is to seek help from a con artist.

On that same day, the infamous swindler Shinichi Akiyama is finally released from jail. This former psychology student is known for single-handedly bankrupting an entire company, and Nao believes he is her only chance at escaping her dire situation. At first, Shinichi is hesitant to commit another crime, ignoring Nao and her request. But after seeing her desperation and persistence, he agrees to assist her.

In this fraudulent world, Nao and Shinichi have their own motives. Yet, soon they see the true nature of not only the game, but also everyone involved.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

data.title: 9: Ruler's Crown - Branch X
data.synopsis:
A special program, delivered from Sophitia's perspective, retracing the journey so far—featuring newly recorded music and fresh announcements—crafted to be enjoyed both by first-time viewers and longtime fans alike.

(Source: Official site)

data.title: Zuoshou Shanglan 3
data.synopsis:
Xu Xingze ended up at Jingbei Affiliated High School by chance, where he met a group of supportive and comrades-in-arms on the basketball team. Through a series of intense games, he gradually discovered the meaning of playing basketball and strengthened his resolve. He longed to defeat Cheng Feng's Beihai Middle School to prove himself, but before that, they have to overcome the formidable obstacle of Jingshi Affiliated High School…

(Source: Tencent, translated)

data.title: Guangyin Zhi Wai
data.synopsis:
The world was a temporary dwelling for all beings, and time flowed like passing travelers. Where the shattered sky opened its eerie eye, life perished and zones became forbidden. In the apocalypse, consequences followed, and life arose from death.

(Source: Youku)
data.background: Adaptation of Ergen's (耳根) web novel of the same title.

data.synopsis: A claymation short film by Takena Nagao.

titles.title: Miss Maid Simply Loves to Eat
Maid Just Simply Love to Eat.
メイドさんは食べるだけ
The Food Diary of Miss Maid

data.title: Maid-san wa Taberu dake
data.title_english: The Food Diary of Miss Maid
data.title_japanese: メイドさんは食べるだけ
title_synonyms: Miss Maid Simply Loves to Eat
Maid Just Simply Love to Eat.
data.synopsis:
What's a maid to do when she finds herself suddenly stuck in Japan for a year? Eat, of course! Follow maid-in-training Suzume Tachibana as she tries all sorts of Japanese food, from sweets like taiyaki and melon bread to savory snacks like takoyaki and onigiri! Be warned, though—while Suzume sates her appetite through delicious treat after delicious treat, she might just end up whetting yours!

(Source: Kodansha USA)
data.background: Each episode was streamed five days in advance of the TV broadcast starting on March 31, 2026, on Crunchyroll. Regular broadcasting began on April 5, 2026.

data.synopsis:
It's become a habit for Yui to have sex with Tsuyoshi, even though she knows she shouldn't. She finds herself kicking into gear every time she drinks strong chuhai. Yui has been restraining herself lately, but Tsuyoshi pushes her down, overcome by jealousy when she talks about her husband.

(Source: OceanVeil)
